emails.subject: NDA
emails.body: Tana, Can I just get a status report on the NDA that you've sent out for me. I want to verify that Spectron and TFS have not executed the NDA yet. Thanks, Dan

emails.subject: NDA
emails.body: Tana, Can I just get a status report on the NDA that you've sent out for me. I want to verify that Spectron and TFS have not executed the NDA yet. Thanks, Dan

emails.subject: Re: NDA
emails.body: Re: NDA TFS was sent out but has not came back in signed. I was out yesterday, so Spectron has not gone out. I have that on my list to do today. Daniel Diamond 03/27/2001 10:48 AM
